name: Fruited Cheese Log
recipeInstructions:
1. Soak apricots in 1 cup of water for 2 hours. Drain and chop.
2. Blend the cheeses.
3. Add remaining ingredients to the blended cheese mixture, mixing thoroughly after each addition.
4. Mix in the fruits last.
5. Turn out onto a sheet of foil and shape into a log (9-inch) or two large balls.
6. Wrap securely and chill until firm.
7. Roll in chopped nuts, cover again in foil, and refrigerate for 24 hours before serving. This may also be frozen.
